name: NexCampus v2.3
changelog: Android support removed (dedicated native app planned for future)
About page layout fixed — content no longer cut off
Windows OCR — Tesseract 5.3 bundled with installer
OCR reliability improved — server first with 8s timeout, browser fallback
One-line install scripts for Linux and Windows
Auto app drawer setup on Linux via install script
Interactive Solar System tool added to Study Lab
In-app update checker now works via GitHub API
